case_title: MARTIN D BERESFORD VS. 1500 FRANCISCO STREET HOME OWNDERS ASSN.#

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERESFORD, MARTIN D RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 1500 FRANCISCO STREET HOME OWNDERS ASSN.# $4,173.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,348.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERESFORD, MARTIN D AS TO DEFENDANT 1500 FRANCISCO STREET HOME OWNDERS ASSN.#
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 90.00 - SERVED MAY-09-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT 1500 FRANCISCO STREET HOME OWNDERS ASSN.#

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-25-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-15-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF *(ROY K. STERN - "UNCLAIMED")* COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT 1500 FRANCISCO STREET HOME OWNDERS ASSN.#
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT 1500 FRANCISCO STREET HOME OWNDERS ASSN.#

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-15-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-15-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ROY STEARN--PRESIDENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2013 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BERESFORD, MARTIN D AS TO DEFENDANT 1500 FRANCISCO STREET HOME OWNDERS ASSN.# ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-25-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT 1500 FRANCISCO STREET HOME OWNDERS ASSN.#
